html:
2026-0514
2026-05-28ISEDBoards of Trade ActOrder Approving the changes the boundaries of the district of La Chambre de Commerce des Trois-Pistoles (Quebec) Order approving the application by La Chambre de Commerce des Trois-Pistoles, in Quebec, to change the boundaries of its district from the Town and Parish of Trois-Pistoles to the Basques region, which includes the municipalities of Trois-Pistoles, Notre-Dame-des-Neiges, Saint-Clément, Saint-Éloi, Saint-Mathieu-de-Rioux, Saint-Médard, Saint-Simon-de-Rimouski, Lac Boisbouscache, Sainte-Françoise, and Sainte-Rita; excluding Saint-Jean-de-Dieu.N/A
subject: Order Approving the changes the boundaries of the district of La Chambre de Commerce des Trois-Pistoles (Quebec)
precis: Order approving the application by La Chambre de Commerce des Trois-Pistoles, in Quebec, to change the boundaries of its district from the Town and Parish of Trois-Pistoles to the Basques region, which includes the municipalities of Trois-Pistoles, Notre-Dame-des-Neiges, Saint-Clément, Saint-Éloi, Saint-Mathieu-de-Rioux, Saint-Médard, Saint-Simon-de-Rimouski, Lac Boisbouscache, Sainte-Françoise, and Sainte-Rita; excluding Saint-Jean-de-Dieu.
